title: rosa hybrida var. subcordata
intro: Rosa hybrida var. subcordata is a hybrid rose plant that is a compact variety of the Rosa hybrida species, known for its unique, cordate leaf shape and compact growth habit. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Rosa hybrida var. subcordata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
